summary.lv: Tech Lead integrāciju komandā Mapon B2B SaaS autoparka pārvaldības platformā, vadot komandu, projektējot risinājumu arhitektūru un sadarbojoties ar Product Manager produkta attīstībā.
summary.en: Tech Lead for the Integrations team at Mapon's B2B SaaS fleet management platform, leading the team, designing solution architecture, and partnering with the Product Manager on roadmap delivery.
